title: ononis repens var. hispanica
intro: Ononis repens var. hispanica, also known as Spanish restharrow, is a perennial plant species in the genus Ononis, native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Spanish restharrow include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Spanish restharrow include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the plant's leaves, stems, and roots in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
